chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 828 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on statement dated 21-03-2024 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.7153/2021 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.7154/2021 (1 Rule 10) 5. For hearing of CMA No.3770/2021 (S/A) 6. For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate submits that the Petitioners have taken away the case file from him. Perusal of the record reflects that on 21-03-2024 both the Petitioners have filed a withdrawal statement of instant Constitutional Petition; same is allowed, consequently, the Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with all pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
